dataset.source: data.json (generated by AM-intel/scripts/build_dashboard.py from news_item/**/*.md frontmatter)
dataset.grain: one row per news_item note (unique note path)
dataset.traceability: each item carries `note` (relative path) back to the vault source file

charts.type: thin-column chart on a CONTINUOUS date axis (every day from first to latest backfill gets a slot; zero days remain as visible gaps)
charts.history: column(active-days-only) -> calendar heatmap (2026-07-23 am) -> rejected after user review: at a 9-week span calendar cells become oversized color tiles and color encodes magnitude worse than length -> continuous-axis timeline (2026-07-23)

encoding.x: date, continuous, one slot per day (58 at review time)

interactions: hover any slot (including zero days) shows date + count
month tick labels on the axis
charts.cross_filter: excludes the date filter; responds to keyword + region + category

charts.shape: matrix comparison (two categorical dimensions x count)
charts.replaced: the two 1D horizontal bar charts (category, region) — their cross-tab is the native heatmap case; 1D distributions alone were rejected for heatmap (a single color strip carries less than a bar)

encoding.columns: region (abbreviated headers EA/AM/IP/EU/US/SEA/GL/CN/NEA, legend below, full name in tooltip/title)
encoding.color: same mint intensity scale; count shown as text in non-zero cells (dark text on light cells, white on dark)

interactions: hover/focus tooltip category x region + count
cell click toggles BOTH category and region filters
row-label click toggles category only; column-header click toggles region only
charts.cross_filter: excludes category + region filters; responds to keyword + date

cross_filter.semantics: charts update live with the query; the timeline excludes the date filter; the category x region matrix excludes those two dimensions' own filters; active selections highlighted, never collapsed
cross_filter.row_order: matrix rows/columns fixed by overall count so cells change intensity in place
cross_filter.zero_values: timeline: zero day = empty slot on the continuous axis (still hoverable, reports 0); matrix: true zero = near-white cell with no number; empty result set stated in caption
cross_filter.scale: per-chart linear max over the chart's current base subset

captions: computed at runtime from live data (bilingual zh/en) so numbers never go stale after daily refresh; under an active query captions restate the subset size; captions describe visible pattern only, no causal or advisory claims

carrier.offline: no external CDN; vanilla JS + CSS only; fonts are local-first with system fallbacks
carrier.print: @media print static state; interactive controls hidden; chart colors forced with print-color-adjust
